subject: Urban watch: kangaroos and koalas positioning around San Francisco | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-7757
body: Please note the apollo stream in San Francisco has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Frida Kahlo. Reference initiative INIT-7757. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: timeline, coordination.
